Copy File.description: Create a copy of the specified file.

Copy File from Another Service.description: Copies an existing file from another service to Google Drive.

Create File From Text.description: Create a new file from plain text.

Create Shared Drive.description: Create a new shared drive (Team Drive) in Google Drive.

Create Shortcut.description: Create a shortcut to a file.

Delete File.description: Delete a file in Google Drive (requires file ID).

Export File.description: Export Google Workspace files to different formats (PDF, Word, Excel, etc.).

Move File.description: Move a file from one folder to another.

Permanently Delete File.description: Permanently delete a file from Google Drive. Cannot be undone.

Remove File Access.description: Remove specific user access to a file.

Upload File.description: Uploads a file to the given path.

Find a File.description: Search for a specific file by name.

Find a Folder.description: Search for a specific folder by name.

Find or Create File.description: Finds or creates a specific file.

Find or Create Folder.description: Finds or creates a specific folder.

List File Permissions.description: List all users who have access to a file.

Retrieve File or Folder by ID.description: Get a file or folder by its ID.
Retrieve File or Folder by ID.code:
// Retrieve metadata for a file or folder by its id.
get($.data.fileId);

Retrieve Files.description: GET request to the Google Drive API to retrieve a list of files.
